200.description: Requantize with collected statistics and hot-swap the layers.
Begin collecting activation statistics from live traffic.

get.summary: Axum handler for `GET /metrics`. Renders the Prometheus exposition format.

200.description: Reapply ISQ to a non GGUF or GGML model.

parameters.name: approval_id
parameters.description: Approval ID from the approval-required SSE event

200.description: Raw file bytes with the file's MIME type

410.description: File body was elided and is no longer fetchable

parameters.name: response_id
parameters.description: The ID of the response to retrieve

parameters.name: response_id
parameters.description: The ID of the response to delete

parameters.name: response_id
parameters.description: The ID of the response to cancel

get.summary: GET `/v1/sessions/{session_id}`. 404 if the session doesn't exist.

ApprovalDecisionRequest.description: Decision payload for a pending agentic tool approval.

message.description: Optional note passed back to the model on denial.

remember_for_session.description: Auto-approve all later tool calls in the same session.

AudioResponseFormat.description: Audio format options for speech generation responses.

CalibrationApplyRequest.description: Request body for applying online calibration.

save_cimatrix.description: Optionally save the collected imatrix to this `.cimatrix` path before requantizing.

ChatCompletionRequest.description: Chat completion request following OpenAI's specification

dry_allowed_length.description: Longest repeated sequence DRY leaves unpenalized.

dry_base.description: Base for DRY's exponential penalty growth.

dry_multiplier.description: DRY repetition penalty multiplier; 0 disables DRY.

dry_sequence_breakers.description: Sequences that reset DRY repetition matching.

enable_code_execution.description: Enable Python code execution tools for this request.

enable_thinking.description: Toggle thinking output for models that support it.

files.description: Required output files. The runtime asks the model to produce them and surfaces a `File` (or error placeholder) for each.

frequency_penalty.description: Penalize tokens by how often they have appeared so far; positive values reduce repetition.

oneOf.description: Constrain output with a regex, JSON schema, Lark, or LLGuidance grammar.

logit_bias.description: Bias added to the logits of these token IDs before sampling.

logprobs.description: Return log probabilities of the output tokens.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate.

max_tool_rounds.description: Maximum number of tool-call rounds the server will auto-execute.

min_p.description: Drop tokens below this fraction of the top token's probability.

model.description: Model ID; "default" targets the only loaded model.

presence_penalty.description: Penalize tokens that have already appeared; positive values push toward new topics.

reasoning_effort.description:
Reasoning effort level for Harmony-format models (GPT-OSS).
Controls the depth of reasoning/analysis: "low", "medium", or "high".

oneOf.description: Force plain text or JSON-schema constrained output.

session_id.description: Persistent agentic state. If `None`, a new session is created and the ID is returned in the response.

stream.description: Stream the response as server-sent events.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature; higher values increase randomness.

oneOf.description: Controls which (if any) tool the model must call.

top_k.description: Sample only from the k most likely tokens.

top_logprobs.description: Number of most likely tokens to return per position; requires `logprobs`.

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling: only tokens within the top cumulative probability mass are considered.

truncate_sequence.description: Truncate inputs that exceed the model's context length instead of erroring.

oneOf.description: Enable the built-in web search tool.

CompletionRequest.description: Legacy OpenAI compatible text completion request

dry_allowed_length.description: Longest repeated sequence DRY leaves unpenalized.

dry_base.description: Base for DRY's exponential penalty growth.

dry_multiplier.description: DRY repetition penalty multiplier; 0 disables DRY.

dry_sequence_breakers.description: Sequences that reset DRY repetition matching.

echo.description: Echo the prompt back alongside the completion.

frequency_penalty.description: Penalize tokens by how often they have appeared so far; positive values reduce repetition.

oneOf.description: Constrain output with a regex, JSON schema, Lark, or LLGuidance grammar.

logit_bias.description: Bias added to the logits of these token IDs before sampling.

logprobs.description: Include log probabilities of this many most likely tokens.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate.

min_p.description: Drop tokens below this fraction of the top token's probability.

model.description: Model ID; "default" targets the only loaded model.

presence_penalty.description: Penalize tokens that have already appeared; positive values push toward new topics.

stream.description: Stream the response as server-sent events.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature; higher values increase randomness.

oneOf.description: Controls which (if any) tool the model must call.

top_k.description: Sample only from the k most likely tokens.

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling: only tokens within the top cumulative probability mass are considered.

truncate_sequence.description: Truncate inputs that exceed the model's context length instead of erroring.

dimensions.description: Truncate embeddings to this dimensionality, if the model supports it.

oneOf.description: Return embeddings as float arrays or base64-encoded strings.

input.description: Text or token inputs to embed.

model.description: Model ID; "default" targets the only loaded model.

truncate_sequence.description: Truncate inputs that exceed the model's context length instead of erroring.

oneOf.description: Embedding returned as an array of floats
Embedding returned as a base64-encoded string

strict.description:
When `true`, the tool's `parameters` JSON schema is enforced on the
generated arguments via constrained decoding (llguidance).

FunctionCalled.description:
Represents a function call made by the assistant

When using tool calling, this structure contains the details of a function
that the model has decided to call, including the function name and its parameters.

name.description: The name of the function to call

json_schema.description: The JSON schema that the grammar should generate

lark_grammar.description: The Lark grammar that the grammar should generate

name.description: The name of this grammar, can be used in GenGrammar nodes

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate

model.description: Model ID; "default" targets the only loaded model.

prompt.example: Draw a picture of a majestic, snow-covered mountain.

response_format.description: Return generated images as URLs or base64 data.

IncludeOption.description:
Include options for response content.

This enum specifies additional content to include in the response.
By default, certain content may be omitted for efficiency.

name.description: Optional participant name for this message

role.description: The role of the message sender ("user", "assistant", "system", "tool", etc.)

tool_call_id.description: Tool call ID this message is responding to (for tool messages)

tool_calls.description: Optional list of tool calls (for assistant messages)

ModelObject.description: Model information metadata about an available mode

mcp_tools_count.description: Number of tools available from MCP servers

tools_available.description: Whether tools are available through MCP or tool callbacks

ModelOperationRequest.description: Request for model operations (unload, reload, status)

error.description: Error message when status indicates an error condition

background.description: Whether to run the request in background (async)

include.description: Specifies additional content to include in the response

input.description: The input for the response - can be a string or array of input items

instructions.description: Additional instructions that guide the model's behavior

max_output_tokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens to generate

max_tool_calls.description:
Maximum number of tool calls allowed.

NOTE: This parameter is not supported. Setting any value will return an error
as mistral.rs does not support limiting the number of tool calls.

model.description: The model to use for this request

parallel_tool_calls.description:
Whether to allow parallel tool calls.

NOTE: Only `true` (default) or `None` is supported. Setting this to `false`
will return an error as mistral.rs does not support disabling parallel tool calls.

previous_response_id.description: ID of a previous response for multi-turn conversations

store.description: Whether to store the response for later retrieval

stream.description: Whether to stream the response using server-sent events

oneOf.description: Stream options for controlling streaming behavior
Controls how the model uses tools

tools.description: Tool definitions available for the model to call

top_logprobs.description: Number of top log probabilities to return

oneOf.description: Truncation strategy when input exceeds context window

ReasoningConfig.description: Reasoning configuration for models that support extended thinking

oneOf.description: Effort level for reasoning (low, medium, high)
Whether to generate a summary of reasoning

ReasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort level for models that support extended thinking

oneOf.description: Structured response following a JSON schema

dry_allowed_length.description: Longest repeated sequence DRY leaves unpenalized.

dry_base.description: Base for DRY's exponential penalty growth.

dry_multiplier.description: DRY repetition penalty multiplier; 0 disables DRY.

dry_sequence_breakers.description: Sequences that reset DRY repetition matching.

enable_thinking.description: Toggle thinking output for models that support it.

frequency_penalty.description: Penalize tokens by how often they have appeared so far; positive values reduce repetition.

oneOf.description: Constrain output with a regex, JSON schema, Lark, or LLGuidance grammar.

input.description: Input messages or a single raw prompt string.

instructions.description: System instructions prepended to the conversation.

logit_bias.description: Bias added to the logits of these token IDs before sampling.

logprobs.description: Return log probabilities of the output tokens.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate.

max_tool_calls.description: Maximum number of tool calls the model may make.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata stored with the response.

min_p.description: Drop tokens below this fraction of the top token's probability.

model.description: Model ID; "default" targets the only loaded model.

output_token_details.description: Include a detailed token breakdown in usage.

parallel_tool_calls.description: Whether tool calls may run in parallel.

presence_penalty.description: Penalize tokens that have already appeared; positive values push toward new topics.

previous_response_id.description: Continue the conversation from a stored previous response.

reasoning_effort.description:
Reasoning effort level for models that support extended thinking.
Valid values: "low", "medium", "high"

reasoning_enabled.description: Toggle reasoning output for models that support it.

reasoning_top_logprobs.description: Number of top logprobs to return for reasoning tokens.

oneOf.description: Force plain text or JSON-schema constrained output.

store.description: Persist the response so it can be fetched later by ID.

stream.description: Stream the response as server-sent events.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature; higher values increase randomness.

oneOf.description: Controls which (if any) tool the model must call.

top_k.description: Sample only from the k most likely tokens.

top_logprobs.description: Number of most likely tokens to return per position; requires `logprobs`.

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling: only tokens within the top cumulative probability mass are considered.

truncate_sequence.description: Truncate inputs that exceed the model's context length instead of erroring.

oneOf.description: Enable the built-in web search tool.

SerializedSession.description: Wire format. Images and video frames are base64 PNGs.

SourceMeta.description: Which agentic tool produced the file, and when in the session.

input.description: The text content to convert to speech.
input.example: [S1] Dia is an open weights text to dialogue model. [S2] You get full control over scripts and voices. [S1] Wow. Amazing. (laughs) [S2] Try it now on Git hub or Hugging Face.

model.description: The TTS model to use for audio generation.

response_format.description: The desired audio format for the generated speech.

StopTokens.description:
Stop token configuration for generation

Defines when the model should stop generating text, either with a single
stop token or multiple possible stop sequences.

strict.description: Whether to use strict schema validation

ToolCall.description:
Represents a tool call made by the assistant

This structure wraps a function call with its type information.

id.description: Unique identifier for this tool call

type.description: The type of tool being called

oneOf.description: Allow automatic selection of any given tool, or none.
Force selection of a given tool.

Tool.description: Force selection of a given tool.

dtype.description: Optional model dtype (auto, f16, bf16, etc)

max_batch_size.description: Optional max batch size for tuning

max_seq_len.description: Optional max sequence length for tuning

requested_isq.description: Optional fixed ISQ level to test (e.g., Q4K)

extract_description.description: Override the description for the extraction tool.

search_description.description: Override the description for the search tool.
